chapter_title.en: Signs preceding the reappearance of Imam Mahdi (a.s)

text: 438- وروي عن النبي صلى الله عليه وآله [أنه] قال:يخرج بقزوين رجل اسمه اسم نبي، يسرع الناس إلى طاعته، المشرك والمؤمن، يملا الجبال خوفا.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 438 - It is narrated from the Messenger of Allah (s) that he said: “A man will rise up from Qazwin, whose name will be same as the name of a Prophet. People will make haste in accepting his authority; but the mountains will be full of disbelievers and believers due to his fear.”
